context.projectOverview: Phase A Sprint 3 (final): build-time ToolRoleGuard that rejects any child whose resolved config would place claude-code on a TOOL_ROLE, throwing BEFORE any spawn. Wired into runFleet's fail-fast credential phase.

completedSprints.title: Grok/xAI provider wiring
completedSprints.summary: grok* -> openai-compat api.x.ai/v1; isXaiEndpoint(). Commit b739ef1.

completedSprints.title: TierProviderPolicy + buildChildConfig overlay
completedSprints.summary: tier-policy.ts + FleetChild.tier; buildChildConfig overlays the tier block before the shallow-merge; byte-identical when tier absent; no claude-code in any tier. Commit 6e25a5f.
